title: Luffy and Nami Are Taken Prisoner
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Brûlée, Luffy, Chopper, Big Mom Pirates, Carrot, Pedro as Luffy and Nami are captured while Sanji is pushed deeper into the wedding trap.
scene: The rescue mission collapses into captivity and emotional pressure as Sanji is forced closer to the arranged wedding.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Help! It's so hot up here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ZIP IT, GIRL! You're hurting my ears!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I don't mind giving MINK MEAT A SHOT!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's obvious that she won't even taste that good!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kay, maybe I should change my mind then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oh shut up, you strange Reindeer creature!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're going to join Mama's collection of strange beasts!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Alright! I've somehow managed to make it up to this point!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since I'm in "heavy point" right now, it'll be easy for me get out of these chains by simply transforming.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since IT's been 6 hours since yesterday when I used it, I can even transform into "monster point" if needed!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm getting in the way ...pedro's gonna kill me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once the exquisite soup is finished... in. She. Goes!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: tends to be hidden inside books.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It even has a page on the rare man-eating lion that has the face of a man!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This lil' one is called a "Manticore".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 2 years ago, it escaped out of Impel down after Blackbeard's rumored Ambush of the place!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew storyline with 35 dialogue beats. Luffy and Nami are imprisoned, while Sanji is cornered by family obligation and Big Mom’s wedding plans.
